name: moveoptimize
description: A local-first moving organizer for finding packed items faster.

scripts.vendor: mkdir -p assets/vendor/roselt assets/vendor/bootstrap-icons && cp node_modules/roselt-js/dist/roselt.js assets/vendor/roselt/roselt.js && cp node_modules/bootstrap-icons/font/bootstrap-icons.css assets/vendor/bootstrap-icons/bootstrap-icons.css && cp -R node_modules/bootstrap-icons/font/fonts assets/vendor/bootstrap-icons/fonts
